examples: The Senian pool in weiyuan gas field is a large massive one with water, it is fracture-vug and pore type.
Parameters sensitive to facture and vug reservoirs are chosen. Principles of integrated characteristic parameters in reservoir identification are introduced.
A dual-porosity and dual-permeability model of fracture-vug carbonate reservoir is established, and fully implicit method is used to solve the inter-porosity flow function.
